content.body: Hey, this might be interesting for people who worked on Sanitizer/Trusted Types or other recent HTML parsing changes: I am exploring how to combine the control function of Trusted Types with the safety features of the Sanitizer API to enable _implicit_ sanitization. https://github.com/mozilla/explainers/blob/main/trusted-or-sanitized-html.md.
